task_completion.description: Verify that work bookmarks are organized into specific folders and personal bookmarks are removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome bookmarks bar or Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks). Verify the presence of exactly these folders: 'Inventory', 'Camera Manuals', 'Insurance', and 'Logistics'. Ensure no obvious personal bookmarks are visible on the bar or in the manager.

task_completion.description: Verify that site notifications are blocked globally.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > Privacy and security > Site settings > Notifications. Verify the radio button for 'Don't allow sites to send notifications' is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that pop-ups are blocked globally except for 'rentman.io'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > Privacy and security > Site settings > Pop-ups and redirects. Verify 'Don't allow sites to send pop-ups or use redirects' is selected, and 'rentman.io' is listed under the 'Allowed to send pop-ups and use redirects' section.

task_completion.description: Verify that all autofill features (passwords, auto sign-in, addresses, payment methods) are disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > Autofill and passwords (or Password Manager / Addresses / Payment methods pages). Verify that toggles for 'Offer to save passwords', 'Auto Sign-in', 'Save and fill payment methods', and 'Save and fill addresses' are all turned off.

task_completion.description: Verify the default download directory is set correctly and location prompting is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > Downloads. Verify the 'Location' path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/Invoices' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is turned off.

task_completion.description: Verify the browser is configured to open the correct URL on startup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings > On startup. Verify 'Open a specific page or set of pages' is selected and 'https://rentman.io/login' is listed as the page to open.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser UI being actively navigated to change settings, rather than terminal commands modifying Chrome JSON preference files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the settings are changed in the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings interface must be the genuine Chrome settings page (showing chrome://settings/... in the address bar) with standard browser elements like tabs and the settings sidebar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent read the specification document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening or reading '~/Desktop/checkout_terminal_standard.txt' (e.g., in a text editor or via terminal 'cat' command) to obtain the configuration instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected bookmark folders are exactly 'Inventory', 'Camera Manuals', 'Insurance', and 'Logistics'. The startup URL must be exactly 'https://rentman.io/login'. The download directory must be exactly '/home/ga/Documents/Invoices'. The popup exception domain must be exactly 'rentman.io'.
